reasoning: The market estimate was 3% as of Oct 16, 2025. With just over two months remaining in 2025, the threshold for resolution (full-scale war indicating regime change intent or significant ground troop deployment) is exceptionally high and requires substantial logistical buildup and political will, neither of which can realistically materialize in a matter of weeks without major prior indicators. The base rate for such a sudden full-spectrum US-involved conflict is practically zero within a two-month horizon. A value of 3% reasonably accounts for the extreme tail risk while strongly favoring a NO resolution.
